schema.title: Response Pages Placeholder Admin Pages  Get

AgentCostEntry.title: AgentCostEntry
AgentCostEntry.description: One agent's cost rollup for a calendar month.

AgentRunRow.title: AgentRunRow
AgentRunRow.description: One row from ``agent_runs`` for the runs listing.

success_rate_7d.title: Success Rate 7D
success_rate_7d.description: Fraction of runs in the last 7 days with status='succeeded' (None when no runs).

ApproveProposalRequest.title: ApproveProposalRequest
ApproveProposalRequest.description:
``POST /admin/proposals/{id}/approve`` body.

By default, approval triggers a validation backtest. Operators can pass
``skip_backtest=true`` for proposals whose ``target`` is not a strategy.

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor
next_cursor.description: Pass as ``cursor`` query param to fetch the next page (older rows).

BacktestRunSummary.title: BacktestRunSummary
BacktestRunSummary.description: One row from ``theeyebeta.backtest_runs`` for the listing.

DailyCostEntry.title: DailyCostEntry
DailyCostEntry.description: One day of aggregated LLM + vendor API costs.

GuardViolationEntry.title: GuardViolationEntry
GuardViolationEntry.description: One row from ``theeyebeta.guard_violations`` for the admin viewer.

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor
next_cursor.description: Pass as ``cursor`` query param to fetch the next page (older rows).

InstrumentSummary.title: InstrumentSummary
InstrumentSummary.description: Minimal instrument fields for order views.

OrderSummary.title: OrderSummary
OrderSummary.description: Order row joined to instrument (list/detail shared core).

ProposalSummary.title: ProposalSummary
ProposalSummary.description: One row from ``theeyebeta.proposals`` for the listing.

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor
next_cursor.description: Pass as ``cursor`` query param (older ``created_at``) to fetch the next page.

RestartServiceResponse.title: RestartServiceResponse
RestartServiceResponse.description: Result of a Docker container restart.

ServiceStatusEntry.title: ServiceStatusEntry
ServiceStatusEntry.description: One Docker container on the ``theeyebeta-net`` network.

SqlExecuteRequest.title: SqlExecuteRequest
SqlExecuteRequest.description:
``POST /admin/sql/execute`` body — write SQL.

Confirmation is enforced via the ``X-Confirm`` and ``X-Idempotency-Key``
headers; this body intentionally only carries the statement and bind
parameters so the audit log captures everything that ran.

TokenResponse.title: TokenResponse
TokenResponse.description: Access token returned in JSON; refresh is httpOnly cookie only.
